trades.market: Will the price of Solana be between $120 and $130 on April 21?
trades.bear: Major unexpected positive catalyst (ETF approval, massive institutional buy) could spike SOL, though 41%+ in 48 hours to a specific range remains highly improbable

trades.market: Will XRP reach $1.50 April 20-26?
trades.bear: Broad crypto selloff from tariff/regulatory news could push XRP away. 2-7 day hold duration has 43% historical WR. Momentum reversal risk.

trades.market: Will Zelenskyy post 20-39 posts from April 7 to April 14, 2026?
trades.bear: Zelenskyy could go dark for security reasons, have connectivity/health issues, or platform changes could affect post counting methodology. Ceasefire deal could reduce communication urgency.

trades.market: Will the price of Ethereum be between $2,400 and $2,500 on April 14?
trades.bear: Black swan event (ETF approval, major protocol upgrade, massive short squeeze) could theoretically drive 15%+ single-day move, but no such catalyst is known

trades.market: Will Tesla (TSLA) beat quarterly earnings?
trades.bear: Unknown Tesla-specific negatives (delivery shortfall, margin compression, regulatory headwinds) could justify lower beat probability. Resolution criteria may differ from standard EPS beat. Market participants may have current quarter data not reflected in research.

trades.market: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 9?
trades.bear: Market's $97K volume suggests informed traders may have more current pricing data showing BTC has retreated below $71K; $72K could be a technical resistance level with significant sell wall; research price ($71,838) may be stale by several hours

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Busan be 23°C on April 15?
trades.bear: An unusually strong warm air mass from the south or foehn-type effect could push temperatures well above average; however, even hitting 20+°C would not guarantee landing on exactly 23°C

trades.market: Will Tesla (TSLA) beat quarterly earnings?
trades.bear: Unknown Tesla-specific negatives (delivery shortfall, margin compression, regulatory headwinds) could justify lower beat probability. Resolution criteria may differ from standard EPS beat. Market participants may have current quarter data not reflected in research.

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 36°C on April 3?
trades.bear: Unexpected cloud cover, rain, or weather system change could drop temperatures; no specific April 3 forecast was found in research

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Taipei be 31°C on April 10?
trades.bear: Unexpected warm air mass or rapid clearing could push temperatures above 30°C; resolution criteria interpretation may differ; April 2026 could have anomalous warming pattern not captured in climatology

trades.market: Will Trump say 'Christian' during TPUSA events on April 17?
trades.bear: Event cancellation, Trump no-show, or unexpectedly non-religious speech focus; resolution criteria might require exact standalone word rather than variants

trades.market: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $50 Week of April 20 2026?
trades.bear: Unprecedented black swan event (nuclear conflict, simultaneous OPEC collapse + global recession announcement) could trigger extreme selling, though still unlikely to reach $50 from $93 in 5 days

trades.market: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $50 Week of April 20 2026?
trades.bear: Unprecedented black swan event (nuclear conflict, simultaneous OPEC collapse + global recession announcement) could trigger extreme selling, though still unlikely to reach $50 from $93 in 5 days

trades.market: Will the ECB announce an increase at the April 2026 meeting?
trades.bear: ECB historically cautious on reversals; forecasts may be conditional on inflation data not yet published; other banks may disagree with Barclays/JPM

trades.market: Will there be at least 2200 measles cases in the U.S. by April 30, 2026?
trades.bear: Sharp deceleration in daily case rate not captured in available data; public health interventions containing active outbreaks; seasonal decline in measles transmission already underway

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Seoul be 15°C on April 11?
trades.bear: Official weather station could record a lower reading than city-wide forecast if located in a cooler microclimate, or an unexpected cold front arrival could suppress the high, though both are very unlikely given the 2°C margin and same-day timing.

trades.market: Will King Charles say "George" or "Washington" during the joint meeting of Congress?
trades.bear: Event cancellation/postponement due to U.S.-U.K. tensions; resolution criteria technicality; extremely terse speech avoiding both words; market closes same day as speech creating timing risk

trades.market: Will Amazon (AMZN) close above $255 on April 24?
trades.bear: If AMZN gapped up 2%+ overnight to $260+ (unverifiable with available data), the 86% YES price would be approximately fair and this NO position would lose

trades.market: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 13?
trades.bear: Crypto markets are 24/7 and highly volatile — a sudden positive catalyst (e.g., ceasefire, tariff rollback) could trigger a sharp intraday rally above $70K. Research may also lack the most current intraday price if BTC has already begun recovering.

trades.market: US x Iran diplomatic meeting by April 28, 2026?
trades.bear: Diplomacy can shift rapidly — both sides have incentives to avoid war, Trump extended ceasefire showing US engagement interest, and surprise back-channel breakthroughs are possible in geopolitics

trades.market: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $95 Week of March 30 2026?
trades.bear: Ambiguity in resolution criteria — if 'hit LOW $95' requires a specific intraday tick at exactly $95.00 rather than trading near/at $95, outcome could differ; low volume ($100) may limit execution

trades.market: Will Tisza win at least 120 seats?
trades.bear: Hungarian polls have historically underestimated Fidesz (2022 precedent); gerrymandered single-member districts could favor Fidesz more than proportional models suggest; rural turnout and media dominance could produce systematic polling error

trades.market: Will NVIDIA (NVDA) close above $185 on April 13?
trades.bear: Weekend tariff escalation announcements targeting China/semiconductors could cause a large Monday gap down; NVIDIA is highly exposed to US-China trade tensions

trades.market: Will Donald Trump publicly insult someone on April 24, 2026?
trades.bear: Resolution criteria might define 'insult' more narrowly than plain language suggests; Trump could have an uncharacteristically quiet day; potential health/travel event limiting public appearances

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Shenzhen be 30°C on April 13?
trades.bear: Warmer-than-forecast afternoon spike or slight model undershoot could push to exactly 30°C; Shenzhen urban heat island effect

trades.market: Will the price of Solana be above $80 on April 3?
trades.bear: Crypto volatility is real—SOL briefly touched $79.09 just 5 days ago, and a sudden sell-off or black swan event could push it below $80 before market close

trades.market: Will Trump say "Iran" during the White House Easter Egg Roll?
trades.bear: Easter Egg Roll is a children's event; staff could successfully keep Trump on brief scripted remarks with no media Q&A, and Trump might deliberately avoid the topic at a family event

trades.market: Will the price of Solana be between $120 and $130 on April 21?
trades.bear: Major unexpected positive catalyst (ETF approval, massive institutional buy) could spike SOL, though 41%+ in 48 hours to a specific range remains highly improbable

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Buenos Aires be 25°C on April 12?
trades.bear: No day-specific forecast available; if a warm air mass pushes forecast to 25-26°C, true probability could reach 18-22%, reducing edge below threshold

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Buenos Aires be 26°C on April 18?
trades.bear: An unseasonable warm air mass or heat event could push temperatures significantly above average; without a specific 1-day forecast in hand, there's residual uncertainty about actual conditions

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Ankara be 16°C on April 22?
trades.bear: The 12°C forecast may apply to April 18-20 only — if a rapid warming trend pushes temperatures toward the 16-17°C late-April climatological average, probability of exactly 16°C increases significantly

trades.market: Will 'BULLY' - Ye debut week album sales be less than 150k?
trades.bear: Missing specific HDD April 1 tracking number; resolution criteria could differ between platforms; minimal promotion could have depressed streaming numbers more than expected

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 28°C or below on April 8?
trades.bear: Severe Western Disturbance or unprecedented pre-monsoon storm system could suppress temps, and I previously lost a Lucknow weather bet on unexpected weather changes — but a 9°C drop in highs far exceeds typical weather-system cooling of 5-7°C

trades.market: Will Trump post "Bully of the Middle East" on Truth Social this week?
trades.bear: Resolution criteria might require exact standalone phrasing rather than phrase embedded in longer post, or 'this week' definition might exclude the confirmed post date
